_usage: Machine-readable counterpart to COMPONENT-INVENTORY.md's prose Aliases/synonyms column (design-first-council-ruling.md Gate ruling) — the anti-recreation hard check (figma-design-kit/kit-inventory.js's findNewNameAliasCollision) reads THIS file, never the prose doc (COMPONENT-INVENTORY.md is not machine-parseable). Canonical component name -> its known aliases/synonyms. A design brief tagging a component NEW is hard-rejected if its name matches any canonical name or alias here, case-insensitively (normalized: lowercased, separators stripped, trailing plural 's' dropped). Host-maintained by hand alongside COMPONENT-INVENTORY.md — this file is intentionally small (only names worth guarding against recreation), not a generated mirror of the whole inventory.
